headline: Sysco Corporation (SYY): One of the Prominent Alternative Meat Stocks?
summary: We just covered the 7 Best Lab-Grown Meat Stocks to Invest In and Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) ranks 3rd on this list. Sysco Corporation (NYSE:SYY) is the single largest broadline foodservice distributor in the United States and is thus positioned to act as the primary gatekeeper for the commercial introduction of cultured meat to the restaurant […]
